content:
FINAL LIVE USER QA — NO MORE DEPLOY CLAIMS

IVX is marked VERIFIED. Now prove real app functionality with user-visible evidence.

TEST NOW:
1. Open https://ivxholding.com
2. Open https://chat.ivxholding.com
3. Login as owner.
4. Send one real IVX IA chat message.
5. Confirm IVX IA replies.
6. Refresh page.
7. Confirm message still exists.
8. Close/reopen app.
9. Confirm message still exists.
10. Open Members module.
11. Confirm real members/waitlist data shows.
12. Test Android layout.
13. Test iOS layout.
14. Test Landing page deals.
15. Test Admin/Owner modules after login.

RETURN ONLY:

STATE:
OWNER_LOGIN:
CHAT_SEND:
AI_REPLY:
CHAT_PERSIST_REFRESH:
CHAT_PERSIST_REOPEN:
MEMBERS_VISIBLE:
LANDING_VISIBLE:
ANDROID_VISIBLE:
IOS_VISIBLE:
SCREENSHOTS_OR_EVIDENCE:
FAILED_ITEMS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Rule:
401 route proof is not enough.
HTTP 200 proof is not enough.
Must prove real user-visible screens work.
If not visible to owner, FINAL_STATUS = FAILED.
